stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The annex shows the layout of an electrical system for a twin-engined aeroplane. What is the purpose of the TRUs?

options.a: To convert AC power into DC power at a different (usually lower) voltage.
options.b: To convert DC power into AC power at a different (usually higher) voltage.
options.c: To separate the DC systems (powered by the generators) from the AC systems (powered by the batteries).
options.d: To separate the AC systems (powered by the generators) from the DC systems (powered by the batteries).
